descripcion: Regulatory subject matters covered by the repository. The materia field in each norm and article indicates which subject matter it belongs to. Enables scaling the repository beyond PDP.

materias.label: Personal Data Protection
materias.descripcion: Norms regulating the processing of personal data, the rights of data subjects, and the obligations of controllers and processors.

materias.label: Artificial Intelligence
materias.descripcion: Norms regulating the development, deployment and use of artificial intelligence systems, including high-risk systems and automated decisions.

materias.label: Children and Adolescents Data
materias.descripcion: Norms specifically regulating the processing of data of minors, including parental consent requirements and use restrictions.

materias.label: Cybersecurity
materias.descripcion: Norms regulating the security of information systems, incident management and reporting obligations in the event of attacks or breaches.

materias.label: Cross-sectoral
materias.descripcion: Norms that are not specialized in any particular subject matter but have relevant impact on one or more repository subject matters. Example: e-commerce, telecommunications or transparency laws with articles on personal data.
